$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/about-banner.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/about-banner
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/about-banner.text:
<$list filter="[[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[yes]else[no]]" variable="chinese">
<$text text={{{ [match[yes]then[Unase a nosotros, Construir juntos una ecologia comunitaria!]else[Join us in building a community ecology!]] }}}/>
{{$:/core/images/link}} <$text text={{{ [match[yes]then[CPL Sitio web oficial]else[CPL website]] }}}/> {{$:/core/images/github}} <$text text={{{ [match[yes]then[CPL Codigo fuente del almacen]else[CPL repository]] }}}/> <$list filter="[match[yes]]"> {{$:/core/images/plugin-generic-language}} QQgrupo de comunicacion: 946052860 {{$:/core/images/home-button}} Mas por venir,Todo en chino Taiwei
<$text text={{{ [match[yes]then[Todos son bienvenidos aCPLContribuya con mas complementos al almacen.!]else[Anyone is welcome to contribute more plugins to the CPL repository!]] }}}/>

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/install-plugin.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/install-plugin-request-model-template
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/install-plugin.subtitle: <$text text={{{ [[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[Confirme la instalacion.]else[Please Confirm to Install]] }}} />
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/install-plugin.text:
\import $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/plugin-size \define dependents-tree(json,checked-title,versions,sizes) <$list filter="[<__json__>jsonindexes[]]" variable="plugin">
<$let install-field={{{ [[cpl-plugin#install#]addsuffix] }}} version-field={{{ [[cpl-plugin#version#]addsuffix] }}}>
''<$text text=<>/>''  <$let v={{{ [<__checked-title__>get] }}}> <$macrocall $name="plugin-size" size={{{ [<__sizes__>jsonget,else[0]] }}} /> <$checkbox tiddler=<<__checked-title__>> field=<> checked="yes" unchecked="no" default="no"> <$text text={{{ [<__checked-title__>getmatch[yes]] :then[match[yes]then[A punto de instalar:]else[Will be installed:]] :else[match[yes]then[No se puede instalar]else[Will not be installed]] }}} /> <$list filter="[<__checked-title__>getmatch[yes]]" variable="t">   <$select tiddler=<<__checked-title__>> field=<>> <$list filter="[<__versions__>jsonget]" variable="version">
<$macrocall $name="dependents-tree" json={{{ [<__json__>jsonextract] }}} checked-title=<<__checked-title__>> versions=<<__versions__>> sizes=<<__sizes__>> />
\end <$list filter="[[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[yes]else[no]]" variable="chinese"> <$let json={{{ [get[text]] }}}> <<< <$let title={{{ [jsonget[title]] }}} version-field={{{ [[cpl-plugin#version#]addsuffix] }}}> ''<$text text={{{ [<chinese>match[yes]then[A punto de instalar:]else[To be installed:]] }}}/>'' <$text text=<<title>>/>    ''<$text text={{{ [<chinese>match[yes]then[Seleccionar version:]else[Select version:]] }}}/>'' <$select tiddler=<<requestTiddler>> field=<<version-field>>> <$list filter="[<json>jsonget[versions],<title>]" variable="version"> <option value=<<version>>><$text text=<<version>>/></option> </$list> </$select>   <$let v={{{ [<requestTiddler>get<version-field>] }}}> <$macrocall $name="plugin-size" size={{{ [<json>jsonget[sizes],<title>,<v>else[0]] }}} /> </$let> </$let> <<< <!-- Arbol de dependencia --> <$list filter="[<json>jsonextract[tree]jsonindexes[]count[]compare:integer:gt[0]]" variable="t"> <$list filter="[<chinese>match[yes]]" variable="t"> Este complemento tiene algunas dependencias. Antes de instalar el complemento, estos complementos se instalaran de forma recursiva. Si estos complementos no se instalan correctamente, se revertiran todas las acciones de instalacion.。 Puede elegir que complementos instalar y elegir sus versiones. El arbol de dependencia del complemento es el siguiente： </$list> <$list filter="[<chinese>!match[yes]]" variable="t"> This plugin has some dependencies that will be installed recursively before installing the plugin, and if these plugins are not installed successfully, all installation actions will be rolled back. It is up to you to choose which plugins to install and select their versions. The plugin dependency tree is as follows: </$list> </$list> <div style="margin-left:-1em;margin-right:6px;"> <$macrocall $name="dependents-tree" json={{{ [<json>jsonextract[tree]] }}} checked-title=<<requestTiddler>> versions={{{ [<json>jsonextract[versions]] }}} sizes={{{ [<json>jsonextract[sizes]] }}} /> </div> <hr/> <$list filter="[<chinese>match[yes]]" variable="t"> NOTA: Aunque CPL Existen ciertas medidas de reversion para fallas de instalacion, pero no se pueden evitar los riesgos potenciales que surgen del complemento en si y la interaccion entre complementos, incluidos, entre otros, * El navegador falla； * Wiki Dano al sistema o perdida de datos; * La ejecucion de scripts maliciosos contenidos en complementos puede provocar fugas de privacidad o danos al sistema.； CPL [[Acepte informes de complementos maliciosos|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/TiddlyWiki-CPL/issues]]Estos complementos se eliminaran de los estantes, pero CPL No hay garantia de que todos los complementos incluidos sean seguros y esten disponibles. Si tiene algun problema despues de la instalacion y causa perdidas，CPL Incapaz de asumir la responsabilidad。 @@background:#e91e3db0;color:white;padding:4px;''Por lo tanto, antes de instalar cualquier complemento, haga una copia de seguridad de suWiki！''@@ Aun asi, ¿todavia quieres instalarlo?？ </$list> <$list filter="[<chinese>!match[yes]]" variable="t"> Note: Although the CPL has some rollback measures for failed installations, it is not immune to the potential risks arising from the plugins themselves and from interactions between plugins, including but not limited to * Browser crashes; * Damage to the Wiki system or loss of data; * Privacy leakage or system damage caused by the execution of malicious scripts contained in the plugin; CPL [[accepts reports of malicious plugins|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/TiddlyWiki-CPL/issues]] and will take down such plugins, but CPL cannot guarantee that all plugins included are safe and available. However, CPL cannot guarantee that all plugins are safe and available. CPL cannot be held responsible for any damage caused by any problem that occurs after you have installed the plugin. @@background:#e91e3db0;color:white;width:100%;padding:4px;''Therefore, please back up your wiki before installing any plugins!''@@ Even so, do you still want to install it? </$list> <$button class="tc-btn-big-green tc-primary-btn" message="tm-close-tiddler"> <$action-sendmessage $message="cpl-install-plugin" response=<<requestTiddler>> /> {{$:/core/images/done-button}} <$text text={{{ [<chinese>match[yes]then[Confirmar la instalacion]else[Confirm to Install]] }}} /> </$button> </$let> </$list>

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/layout.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/layout
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/layout.name: CPL
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/layout.description: <$text text={{{ [[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[Centro de agregacion de complementos de Taiwei]else[TW5 Central Plugin Library]] }}} />
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/layout.text:
\whitespace trim \import [subfilter{$:/core/config/GlobalImportFilter}] \define containerClasses() tc-page-container tc-language-$(languageTitle)$ cpl-layout-container \end \procedure tv-config-toolbar-icons() yes \procedure tv-config-toolbar-text() yes \procedure redirected-navigate-actions() <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/layout" text="" /> <$action-navigate $to=<> /> \end <$navigator story="$:/StoryList" history="$:/HistoryList" openLinkFromInsideRiver={{$:/config/Navigation/openLinkFromInsideRiver}} openLinkFromOutsideRiver={{$:/config/Navigation/openLinkFromOutsideRiver}} relinkOnRename={{$:/config/RelinkOnRename}}> <$messagecatcher $tm-navigate=<>>
>> {{$:/core/ui/PageTemplate/pluginreloadwarning}} <$transclude $tiddler="$:/core/ui/CommandPaletteTemplate" $mode="inline" /> <$button to=<> class="cpl-layout-back-button cpl-normal-button"> <$text text={{{ [[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[Volver al diseno estandar]else[Back to Standard layout]] }}} /> {{$:/core/images/default-layout}} <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/layout" text="" /> {{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/panel}}

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/paged-plugin-l.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/paged-plugin-list
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/paged-plugin-l.text:
\define paged-plugin-list-control(class2:"") \whitespace trim <$list filter="[!match]">
<$list filter="[!match]"> <$button setTitle=<> setTo=<>>{{$:/core/images/left-arrow}}
<$text text={{{ [add[1]] }}}/> / <$text text={{{ [add[1]] }}}/>
<$list filter="[!match]"> <$button setTitle=<> setTo=<>>{{$:/core/images/right-arrow}}
\end \define paged-plugin-list(filter,field,pageSize:"10",indexTitle:"$:/temp/CPL-Repo/plugins-index",class1:"",class2:"") \whitespace trim <$let pageSize={{{ [<__pageSize__>min[1]] }}} indexTitle=<<__indexTitle__>> pageState=<> pluginCount={{{ $filter$ +[count[]] }}}> <$let pageMin="0" pageMax={{{ [divide<__pageSize__>ceil[]subtract[1]max[0]] }}}> <$let page={{{ [get[text]else] +[maxmin] }}}> <$let firstIndex={{{ [multiply<__pageSize__>] }}} nextPage={{{ [add[1]min] }}} lastPage={{{ [subtract[1]max] }}}> <>
<$list filter="$filter$ +[restfirst<__pageSize__>]" variable="plugin"> <$macrocall $name="plugin-list-item" json={{{ [{$:/temp/CPL-Repo/plugins-index}jsonextract] }}} field="$field$" class="cpl-plugin-info-box" />
<> \end

<$list filter="[[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[yes]else[no]]" variable="chinese"> <$button disabled={{{ [{$:/temp/CPL-Repo/getting-plugins-index}match[yes]else[no]] }}} class="tc-btn-big-green tc-primary-btn"> <$action-sendmessage $message="cpl-get-plugins-index" /> {{$:/core/images/download-button}} <$text text={{{ [[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/plugins-index]is[tiddler]] :then[match[yes]then[Actualizar la base de datos]else[Refresh Database]] :else[match[yes]then[Cargar base de datos]else[Load Database]] }}} /> <$text text={{{ [match[yes]then[Imagen actual]else[Current mirror]] }}}/>: <$text text={{{ [{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-repo}!is[blank]else[https://tiddly-gittly.github.io/TiddlyWiki-CPL/library/all]] }}} /> <$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/getting-plugins-index]is[tiddler]!field:text[yes]]">
<$text text={{{ [match[yes]then[Algo salio mal]else[Some errors occured]] }}}/>: <$text text={{!!text}}/> <$text text={{{ [match[yes]then[Intente actualizar]else[Please try refreshing]] }}}/>

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/plugin-list-it.text:
\define tag-plain(text:"",icon:"",color:"",bg:"") \whitespace trim {{$icon$}}$text$ \end \define install-plugin-button(plugin,libraryVersion,installedVersion) \whitespace trim
<$let libraryVersion=<<__libraryVersion__>> installedVersion=<<__installedVersion__>> plugin=<<__plugin__>>> <$set name="reinstall-type" value={{{ [compare:version:eqthen[tc-reinstall]] [compare:version:gtthen[tc-reinstall-upgrade]] [compare:version:ltthen[tc-reinstall-downgrade]] }}}> <$button class={{{ [!is[blank]then] tc-btn-invisible tc-install-plugin +[join[ ]] }}} disabled={{{ [[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/instal-plugin-requesting]field:text[yes]else[]] [[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/installing-plugin]field:text[yes]else[]] +[unique[]match[yes]limit[1]else[no]] }}}> <$action-sendmessage $message="cpl-install-plugin-request" title=<> version=<>/> <$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/instal-plugin-requesting]field:plugin-title]">{{$:/core/images/timestamp-on}} <$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/instal-plugin-requesting]!field:plugin-title]"> {{$:/core/images/download-button}} <$list filter="[is[blank]]">{{$:/language/ControlPanel/Plugins/Install/Caption}} <$list filter="[!is[blank]]"> <$list filter="[compare:version:gt]">{{$:/language/ControlPanel/Plugins/Update/Caption}} <$list filter="[compare:version:lt]">{{$:/language/ControlPanel/Plugins/Downgrade/Caption}} <$list filter="[compare:version:eq]">{{$:/language/ControlPanel/Plugins/Reinstall/Caption}}
\end \define plugin-list-item(json,field,show-suggestion:"yes",class:"") \whitespace trim \import $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/plugin-size <$list filter="[[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[yes]else[no]]" variable="chinese">
<$let json=<<__json__>>> <$let title={{{ [jsonget[title]] }}} tags={{{ [jsonget[tags]] }}} icon={{{ [jsonget[icon]trim[]] }}} type={{{ [jsonget[type]else[plugin]] }}} name={{{ [jsonget[name]] ~[jsonget[title]split[/]last[1]] }}} description={{{ [jsonget[description]] }}} version={{{ [jsonget[version]] }}} category={{{ [jsonget[category]!is[blank]else[Unknown]] }}} installedVersion={{{ [jsonget[title]get[version]] }}} detailJsonTitle={{{ $:/temp/CPL-Repo/plugin-info [jsonget[title]] +[join[/]] }}} detailJsonStateTitle={{{ $:/temp/CPL-Repo/querying-plugin [jsonget[title]] +[join[/]] }}} > <$let popup-state={{{ $:/temp/CPL-Repo/popup-state [<__field__>] [] +[join[/]] }}}> <!-- Introduccion al complemento --> <div class="tc-plugin-info"> <!-- Ampliar/Boton contraer --> <div class="tc-plugin-info-chunk tc-plugin-info-toggle"> <$reveal type="nomatch" state=<<popup-state>> text="yes"> <$button class="tc-btn-invisible tc-btn-dropdown" set=<<popup-state>> setTo="yes"> <$action-sendmessage $message="cpl-query-plugin" title=<<title>>/> {{$:/core/images/chevron-right}} </$button> </$reveal> <$reveal type="match" state=<<popup-state>> text="yes"> <$button class="tc-btn-invisible tc-btn-dropdown" set=<<popup-state>> setTo="no"> {{$:/core/images/chevron-down}} </$button> </$reveal> </div> <!-- Icono de complemento --> <div class="tc-plugin-info-chunk tc-plugin-info-icon"> <$list filter="[<icon>!is[blank]]"> <img src=<<icon>>/> </$list> <$list filter="[<icon>is[blank]]"> <$transclude tiddler={{{ [[$:/core/images/plugin-generic-]addsuffix<type>] }}}/> </$list> </div> <!-- Titulo, introduccion, version, si se debe instalar, clasificacion de etiquetas. --> <div class="tc-plugin-info-chunk tc-plugin-info-description"> <h1><strong><$text text=<<name>>/></strong>: <$text text=<<description>>/></h1> <h2><$text text=<<title>>/></h2> <div><em><$text text=<<version>>/></em></div> <div style="padding-top:4px;"> <$macrocall $name="tag-plain" text={{{ [<chinese>match[yes]] :then[<category>addprefix[$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/PluginCategory/]get[text]else[Sin categoria]] :else[<category>] }}} icon="$:/core/images/folder" bg="#3f51b5" color="#fff" /> <$let bg={{{ [{$:/palette}getindex[tag-background]] }}} color={{{ [{$:/palette}getindex[foreground]] }}}> <$list filter="[enlist<tags>]" variable="tag"> <$macrocall $name="tag-plain" text=<<tag>> icon="$:/core/images/tag-button" bg=<<bg>> color=<<color>> /> </$list> </$let> </div> <$list filter="[<installedVersion>!is[blank]]" variable="t"> <div><em>{{$:/language/ControlPanel/Plugins/AlreadyInstalled/Hint}}</em></div> </$list> <$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/instal-plugin-requesting]is[tiddler]field:plugin-title<plugin>]"> <$list filter="[{$:/temp/CPL-Repo/instal-plugin-requesting}match[yes]]"> <span style="color:#3ed044;font-weight:800;"><$text text={{{ [<chinese>match[yes]then[Preparacion para la instalacion...]else[Preparing installation...]] }}}/></span> </$list> <$list filter="[{$:/temp/CPL-Repo/instal-plugin-requesting}!match[yes]]"> <span style="color:#fd160e;font-weight:800;"><$text text={{{ [<chinese>match[yes]then[Error: ]else[Error: ]addsuffix{$:/temp/CPL-Repo/instal-plugin-requesting}] }}}/></span> </$list> </$list> <$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/installing-plugin]is[tiddler]field:plugin-title<plugin>]"> <$list filter="[{$:/temp/CPL-Repo/installing-plugin}match[yes]]"> <span style="color:#3ed044;font-weight:800;"><$text text={{{ [<chinese>match[yes]then[Instalacion...]else[Installing...]] }}}/></span> </$list> <$list filter="[{$:/temp/CPL-Repo/installing-plugin}!match[yes]]"> <span style="color:#fd160e;font-weight:800;"><$text text={{{ [<chinese>match[yes]then[Error: ]else[Error: ]addsuffix{$:/temp/CPL-Repo/installing-plugin}] }}}/></span> </$list> </$list> </div> <!-- Boton Instalar --> <div class="tc-plugin-info-chunk tc-plugin-info-buttons"> <$macrocall $name="install-plugin-button" plugin=<<title>> libraryVersion=<<version>> installedVersion=<<installedVersion>> /> </div> </div> <!-- Detalles --> <$list filter="[<popup-state>field:text[yes]]"> <div class="tc-plugin-info-dropdown"> <!-- Mensaje de error --> <$list filter="[<detailJsonStateTitle>is[tiddler]!field:text[yes]]"> <div style="background:#e91e3db0;color:white;padding:2px 6px;margin:3px 0;border-radius:2px;backdrop-filter:blur(4px);min-height:100px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;"> <$text text={{{ [<chinese>match[yes]then[Algo salio mal]else[Some errors occured]] }}}/>: <$text text={{!!text}}/> <$text text={{{ [<chinese>match[yes]then[Intente actualizar]else[Please try refreshing]] }}}/> </div> </$list> <!-- Mensaje de carga --> <$list filter="[<detailJsonStateTitle>is[tiddler]field:text[yes]]"> <div style="background:#0005;color:#aaa;padding:2px 6px;margin:3px 0;border-radius:2px;backdrop-filter:blur(4px);min-height:100px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;"> <$text text={{{ [<chinese>match[yes]then[Cargando...]else[Loading...]] }}}/> </div> </$list> <!-- Detalles del complemento --> <$list filter="[<detailJsonStateTitle>!is[tiddler]]" veriable="t"> <$let json={{{ [<detailJsonTitle>get[text]] }}}> <$let title={{{ [<json>jsonget[title]] }}} readme={{{ [<json>jsonget[readme]] }}} parent-plugin={{{ [<json>jsonget[parent-plugin]] }}} dependents={{{ [<json>jsonget[dependents]] }}} latest={{{ [<json>jsonget[latest]] }}} author={{{ [<json>jsonget[author]] }}} suggestions={{{ [<json>jsonget[suggestions]] }}} > <!-- Dependencia --> <$list filter="[<title>!is[tiddler]]" variable="ignore"> <div style="background:#e91e3db0;color:white;padding:6px;" class="cpl-plugin-dependencies"> {{$:/language/ControlPanel/Plugins/NotInstalled/Hint}}  <$list filter="[enlist<dependents>] [<parent-plugin>] +[unique[]!is[blank]!is[tiddler]limit[1]]" variable="ignore"> <div> {{$:/language/ControlPanel/Plugins/AlsoRequires}} <$list filter="[enlist<dependents>] [<parent-plugin>] +[unique[]!is[blank]!is[tiddler]sort[name]]" variable="dependency"> <span style="border-radius:12px;padding:3px 8px;background:#1c3b40c2;font-size:12px;line-height:24px"><$text text=<<dependency>>/></span> </$list> </div> </$list> </div> </$list> <!-- Versiones historicas --> <$list filter="[<json>jsonget[versions]count[]compare:integer:gt[1]]" variable="t"> <details class="more-versions-details"> <summary style="background:#246b84;padding:4px 10px;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;"> <$text text={{{ [<chinese>match[yes]then[Explora otras versiones historicas]else[Browse older versions]] }}}/> </summary> <$list filter="[<json>jsonget[versions]reverse[]]" variable="version"> <div style="background:#1a4655;padding:4px 12px;display:flex;flex-direction:row;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-top:1px solid #15333c;"> <span> <span style="color: white;"><<version>></span> <span style="opacity: 0.8;"> (<$macrocall $name="plugin-size" size={{{ [<json>jsonget[versions-size],<version>else[0]] }}} />)</span> <$list filter="[<latest>compare:version:eq<version>]"> <span class="cpl-latest-version-icon">{{$:/core/images/star-filled}}</span></$list> <$list filter="[<installedVersion>compare:version:eq<version>]"> <span class="cpl-installed-version-icon">{{$:/core/images/done-button}}</span></$list> </span> <div style="font-size:0.8em;line-height:1.2;"><$macrocall $name="install-plugin-button" plugin=<<title>> libraryVersion=<<version>> installedVersion=<<installedVersion>> /></div> </div> </$list> </details> </$list> <!-- Texto --> <div class="tc-plugin-info-dropdown-body"> <$wikify name="rendered" text=<<readme>> output="html"><<rendered>></$wikify> </div> <!-- Recomendar --> <$list filter="[<__show-suggestion__>match[yes]]" variable="t"> <div style="padding:10px 20px;backdrop-filter:contrast(1.1);"> <!-- Otros complementos del autor --> <$list filter="[{$:/temp/CPL-Repo/authors}jsonget<author>count[]compare:integer:gt[1]]" variable="t"> <details> <summary style="padding:10px 0;"> <$text text={{{ [<chinese>match[yes]then[Otros complementos del autor]else[Other plugins of Author]] }}} /> </summary> <div style="padding:6px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;"> <$list filter="[{$:/temp/CPL-Repo/authors}jsonget<author>] -[<title>]" variable="plugin"> <$macrocall $name="plugin-list-item" json={{{ [{$:/temp/CPL-Repo/plugins-index}jsonextract<plugin>] }}} field="$field$-author-suggestion" show-suggestion="no" class="cpl-plugin-info-box" /> </$list> </div> </details> </$list> <!-- Recomendaciones de complementos --> <$list filter="[enlist<suggestions>count[]compare:integer:gt[1]]" variable="t"> <details> <summary style="padding:10px 0;"> <$text text={{{ [<chinese>match[yes]then[Complementos que pueden interesarle]else[Plugins you may be interested in]] }}} /> </summary> <div style="padding:6px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;"> <$list filter="[enlist<suggestions>]" variable="plugin"> <$macrocall $name="plugin-list-item" json={{{ [{$:/temp/CPL-Repo/plugins-index}jsonextract<plugin>] }}} field="$field$-author-suggestion" show-suggestion="no" class="cpl-plugin-info-box" /> </$list> </div> </details> </$list> </div> </$list> </$let> </$let> </$list> </div> </$list> </$let> </$let> </$let> </div> </$list> \end

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/plugin-size.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/plugin-size
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/plugin-size.text:
\define plugin-size(size:"0")
<$list filter="[<__size__>compare:integer:gt[0]]" variable="size" emptyMessage="?">
<$let unit-step={{{ [<size>compare:integer:gteq[1048576]] :then[<size>compare:integer:gteq[1073741824]then[GiB#1073741824]else[MiB#1048576]] :else[<size>compare:integer:gteq[1024]then[KiB#1024]else[B#1]] }}}>
<$let unit={{{ [<unit-step>split[#]first[]] }}} step={{{ [<unit-step>split[#]last[]] }}}>
<$text text={{{ [<size>divide<step>fixed[2]] [<unit>] +[join[ ]] }}}/>
</$let>
</$let>
</$list>
\end

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/popup-readme.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/popup-readme
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/popup-readme.subtitle: <$text text={{{ [[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[CPL Instrucciones de uso]else[Note to use CPL]] }}}/>
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/popup-readme.text:
<$list filter="[[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[yes]else[no]]" variable="chinese">

<$checkbox
    tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/popup-readme-at-startup"
    field="text"
    checked={{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/popup-readme-at-startup-threshold}}
    unchecked="0"
    default="0">
    <$text text={{{ [<chinese>match[yes]then[No vuelvas a mostrar este mensaje]else[No longer pops up this message]] }}}/>
</$checkbox>

{{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/readme}}

<$list filter="[<chinese>match[yes]]">

CPL Cada funcion requiere una conexion a Internet y una descarga desde el sitio web de recursos estaticos de la base de datos del complemento. JSON Archivo para implementar。CPL Solo se descargaran datos del sitio web, sus datos no se cargaran。

Futuro CPL Se pueden agregar funciones de complementos de votacion y descarga de estadisticas. Si se anaden estas funciones, se obtendra primero su consentimiento. Siempre podras desactivar estas funciones en el futuro。

Puedes verlo aqui CPL Codigo logico de complemento: [[$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/core.js]]

CPL La funcion de deteccion automatica de actualizaciones no esta activada actualmente. Si desea activarlo, vaya a la pagina de configuracion para activarlo manualmente.：<$button>Configuracion<$action-sendmessage $message="tm-modal" $param="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/settings" /></$button>

</$list>

<$list filter="[<chinese>match[no]]">

The functions of the CPL require an Internet connection to download JSON files from the plug-in database's static resource site for implementation. The CPL will only download data from the site, it will not upload your data.

In the future, CPL may add plugin polling and download statistics, and will ask for your permission to add these features. You can disable these features at any time in the future.

You can view the logic code of the CPL plugin here: [[$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/core.js]]

CPL has not yet enabled the automatic update detection function, if you want to enable it, please go to the settings page manually to start it: <$button>Settings<$action-sendmessage $message="tm-modal" $param="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/settings" /></$button>

</$list>

</$list>

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/readme.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/readme
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/readme.text:
{{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/about-banner}}
<$list filter="[[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[yes]else[no]]" variable="chinese"> <$list filter="[match[yes]]"> > Es tan facil de usar que te hace llorar, solo finge que se acabo! !! Bienvenido CPL! uso TW ¿Todavia te preocupa encontrar complementos utiles despues de todo este tiempo? ¿Todavia le preocupa administrar una gran cantidad de actualizaciones de complementos y lidiar con las dependencias de los complementos? ¿Sigues buscando en Internet para encontrar el uso de complementos? ¿Quieres instalar una version historica de un complemento en lugar de la ultima version?？ Si es autor de complementos, ¿todavia le preocupa como promocionar su complemento y como permitir que los usuarios obtengan la ultima version a tiempo?？ ¿Quieres TW Al igual que otros programas modernos para tomar notas, puede administrar todos los complementos con un solo clic, buscar e instalar complementos de manera mas infalible e incluso promocionar activamente complementos para usted. quieres TW Te ayuda a mantener los complementos actualizados automaticamente？ Todo esto, en CPL realizarse！ --- CPL se compone de[[Demasiado pequeno(TiddlyWiki)comunidad china|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly]]Mantenido y dedicado a recopilar toda la informacion relevante en Internet. <$text text={{{ TiddlyWiki5 }}}/> Con respecto a los complementos, esperamos brindar una experiencia de instalacion y actualizacion de complementos con un solo clic para los usuarios de Taiwei en China y en todo el mundo.。 Este complemento tiene las siguientes caracteristicas： * Agrega varios TW Complementos y mantengase actualizado 500+; * En tu Wiki Busque varios complementos, proporcionando busqueda de palabras clave, categorias y etiquetas.; * Buscar automaticamente actualizaciones de complementos; * Al instalar complementos, las dependencias se pueden instalar automaticamente de forma recursiva y se pueden especificar las versiones de instalacion de todos los complementos.; <$list filter="[match[no]]"> > Just install it! I think you need it. !! Welcome to CPL! After using TW for so long, are you still worried about looking around for good plugins? Are you still struggling to manage a bunch of plugin updates and deal with plugin dependencies? Are you still searching the web to find out how to use a plugin? Do you want to install some historical version of a plugin instead of the latest version? If you are a plugin author, do you still struggle with how to promote your plugin and how to keep users up to date with the latest version? Do you wish TW could manage all your plugins with one click like other modern note-taking software, make it more foolproof to find and install plugins, and even proactively promote plugins for you? Do you want TW to help you keep your plugins up-to-date automatically? It's all here at CPL! --- This plugin source is maintained by the [[TiddlyWiki Chinese Community|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly]] and is dedicated to collecting all <$text text={{{ TiddlyWiki5 }}}/> related plugins on the web, hoping to provide a one-click installation and update plugin experience for TW users all around the world. This plugin has the following features: * Aggregate various TW plugins and keep them up-to-date with the current 500+;. * Search for various plugins in your Wiki, providing keyword, category and tag search;. * Check for plugin updates automatically; * Install plugins with automatic recursive installation of dependencies, and you can specify the installed version of all plugins;

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/settings.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/settings
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/settings.caption: <$text text={{{ [[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[Configuracion]else[Settings]] }}}/>
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/settings.subtitle: <$text text={{{ [[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[CPL Configuracion]else[CPL Settings]] }}}/>
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/settings.text:
<$list filter="[[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[yes]else[no]]" variable="chinese">

<$list filter="[<chinese>match[yes]]">

En esta pagina puedes CPL Establecer el comportamiento del complemento.。

; CPL Entrada de duplicacion de base de datos <$select tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-repo" field="text">
<$list filter="[{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/repos}enlist-input[]]" variable="repo">
<option value=<<repo>>><$text text=<<repo>>/></option>
</$list>
</$select>

<<<
cuando CPL Cuando a menudo no puede obtener datos, puede intentar cambiar a otros espejos, que actualmente se recomiendan en China. netlify espejo，

Todos son bienvenidos a desplegar espejos domesticos. Por favor contactenos para mas detalles.QQGrupos de comunicacion o en[[GitHub Issue|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/TiddlyWiki-CPL/issues]]Haz preguntas

Puede cambiar manualmente la entrada de duplicacion de la base de datos.：[[$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-repo]]
<<<

; Intervalo de verificacion de actualizacion automatica <$edit-text tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-update-intervals-minutes" tag="input" default="-1" /> (minutos/veces)

<<<
La verificacion de actualizacion automatica se realizara en Wiki Realizado cuando se abrio por primera vez y se reviso en intervalos especificos

Obviamente, la verificacion automatica requiere una conexion a Internet y el trafico consumido cada vez es muy pequeno, aproximadamente10KB。Si se encuentra un complemento que se puede actualizar, aparecera un recordatorio emergente en la esquina superior derecha.。

Cuando el valor es menor o igual a0，Desactiva las actualizaciones automaticas, incluidas las que acabas de activar. Wiki Esa vez。

Despues de cerrar, puedes manualmente [[$:/ControlPanel]] de [CPL] Registrese。
<<<

; Filtro de actualizacion de complementos <$edit-text tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/update-filter" tag="input" default="" />

<<<
Las actualizaciones de complementos son selectivas y puede excluir algunos complementos modificando los filtros.。
<<<

<$checkbox
    tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/popup-readme-at-startup"
    field="text"
    checked={{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/popup-readme-at-startup-threshold}}
    unchecked="0"
    default="0">
    No mas mensajes emergentes de bienvenida al inicio
</$checkbox>

</$list>

<$list filter="[<chinese>match[no]]">

In this page you can set the behavior of the CPL plugin.

; CPL Database Mirror Entry <$select tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-repo" field="text">
<$list filter="[{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/repos}enlist-input[]]" variable="repo">
<option value=<<repo>>><$text text=<<repo>>/></option>
</$list>
</$select>

<<<
When the CPL fails to fetch the data often, you can try to switch to another mirror.

If you'd like to deploy your own mirrors, feel free to ask questions in the [[GitHub Issue|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/TiddlyWiki-CPL/issues]]!

You can manually change the database mirror entry: [[$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-repo]]
<<<

; Automatic update of check intervals <$edit-text tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-update-intervals-minutes" tag="input" default="-1" /> (minute(s) per time)

<<<
The automatic update check is performed when the Wiki is first opened, and at specified intervals

Obviously auto-checking requires an internet connection and consumes very little traffic each time, about 10KB. If a plugin is found to be updatable, a pop-up window will alert you in the upper right corner.

When the value is less than or equal to 0, auto-update is turned off, also when the Wiki is just opened.

After closing it can be checked manually in [CPL] of [[$:/ControlPanel]].
<<<

; Plugin Update Filter <$edit-text tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/update-filter" tag="input" default="" />

<<<
Plugin updates are selective and you can exclude some plugins by modifying the filter.
<<<

<$checkbox
  tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/popup-readme-at-startup"
  field="text"
  checked={{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/popup-readme-at-startup-threshold}}
  unchecked="0"
  default="0">
  No longer pops up the welcome message at startup
</$checkbox>

</$list>

</$list>

<$button class="tc-primary-btn tc-btn-big-green cpl-plugin-search-go" disabled={{$:/temp/CPL-Repo/searching-plugin}}> <$text text={{{ [[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]] :then[{$:/temp/CPL-Repo/searching-plugin}match[yes]then[Buscando...]else[Buscar]] :else[{$:/temp/CPL-Repo/searching-plugin}match[yes]then[Searching...]else[Search]] }}} /> <$action-sendmessage $message="cpl-search-plugins" mode="tags" text={{{ [get[text]] }}} saveTo="$:/temp/CPL-Repo/searchplugin-tags/result" />

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/uninstall-plug.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/uninstall-plugin-model-template
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/uninstall-plug.subtitle: <$text text={{{ [[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[Confirme la desinstalacion.]else[Please Confirm to Uninstall]] }}} />
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/uninstall-plug.text:
\define checkShadow() <$action-listops $tiddler=<> $field=<> $subfilter="[]"/> \define uncheckShadow() <$action-listops $tiddler=<> $field=<> $subfilter="-[]"/> <$let chinese={{{ [[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[yes]else[no]] }}}> <$list filter="[match[yes]]"> > A punto de ser desinstalado <> <$list filter="[!field:plugin-type[]search:parent-plugin] [!field:plugin-type[]search:dependent] +[limit[1]]" variable="t"> --- !! Nota: Los complementos dependen de Este complemento todavia depende de los siguientes complementos. ¿Quieres continuar desinstalandolo?？ <$list filter="[!field:plugin-type[]search:parent-plugin] [!field:plugin-type[]search:dependent] +[unique[]sort[title]]" variable="other-plugin"> : <> --- !! NOTA: ENTRADAS DE RESIDENTES En este complemento, algunos elementos ya no son los valores predeterminados.(Hay una entrada no oculta con el mismo nombre.)，Entonces estas entradas permaneceran despues de eliminar el complemento. Esto podria funcionar para ti Wiki Agregue algunas entradas basura adicionales o cause problemas en la proxima instalacion o actualizacion del complemento. Entonces, al eliminar un complemento, ¿deberia limpiar tambien estas entradas? Seleccione el elemento que desea eliminar o conservar, o haga clic en su titulo para ver su contenido y decidir.。 Despues de decidir, haga clic en el boton a continuacion para desinstalar el complemento y eliminar los elementos marcados al mismo tiempo.。 <$list filter="[match[no]]"> > To uninstall <> <$list filter="[!field:plugin-type[]search:parent-plugin] [!field:plugin-type[]search:dependent] +[limit[1]]" variable="t"> --- !! Note: Plugin is Dependent The plugin is still dependent on the following plugins, do you continue to uninstall? <$list filter="[!field:plugin-type[]search:parent-plugin] [!field:plugin-type[]search:dependent] +[unique[]sort[title]]" variable="other-plugin"> : <> --- !! Note: Left tiddlers The plugin has some entries that are no longer default (there is a non-shadow entry with the same name), so these entries will remain after removing the plugin. This may add some extra junk entries to your Wiki, or cause problems for the next time you install the plugin or upgrade it. So when deleting a plugin, should you clean up these entries at the same time? Please select the entry you want to delete or keep, or click on its title to see what it says to decide. After deciding, click the button below to uninstall the plugin and remove the checked entries at the same time. <$button class="tc-btn-big-green tc-primary-btn" message="tm-close-tiddler"> {{$:/core/images/delete-button}} <$text text={{{ [match[yes]then[Confirmar la desinstalacion]else[Confirm to Uninstall]] }}} /> <$action-deletetiddler $filter="[get[text]enlist-input[]] []" /> <$let keep={{{ [match[yes]then[Reservado]else[Keep]] }}} nokeep={{{ [match[yes]then[Eliminar]else[Delete]] }}}> <$let tiddler=<> field="text">
<$list filter="[get[text]jsonindexes[tiddlers]is[tiddler]]" variable="shadow" emptyMessage="<$text text={{{ [match[yes]then[Ninguno]else[]] }}} />"> <$let is-keep={{{ [get[text]enlist-input[]matchlimit[1]then[no]else[yes]] }}}>
match[yes]then[#00ff2d1d]else[#fd004748]] [[;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:4px 6px;border:1px solid #7774]] +[join[]] }}}> <> <$checkbox filter="[get[text]enlist-input[]]" checked=<> checkactions=<> uncheckactions=<>> ''<$text text={{{ [match[yes]thenelse] }}}/>''

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/update-body.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/update-body
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/update-body.subtitle: <$text text={{{ [[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[Lista de actualizacion]else[Update List]] }}}/>
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/update-body.text:
\import $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/plugin-list-item \import $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/plugin-size \import $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/paged-plugin-list <$list filter="[[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[yes]else[no]]" variable="chinese"> <$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/update-plugins]is[tiddler]] [[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/plugins-index]is[tiddler]] +[count[]compare:integer:eq[2]then[yes]else[no]]" variable="ready"> <$list filter="[match[yes]]"> <> <$list filter="[match[no]]"> <$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/getting-plugins-index]is[tiddler]!field:text[yes]]">
<$text text={{{ [match[yes]then[Algo salio mal]else[Some errors occured]] }}}/>: <$text text={{!!text}}/> <$text text={{{ [match[yes]then[Intente actualizar]else[Please try refreshing]] }}}/>
<$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/updaing]is[tiddler]!field:text[yes]]">
<$text text={{{ [match[yes]then[Algo salio mal]else[Some errors occured]] }}}/>: <$text text={{!!text}}/> <$text text={{{ [match[yes]then[Intente actualizar]else[Please try refreshing]] }}}/>
<$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/getting-plugins-index]is[tiddler]field:text[yes]] [[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/updaing]is[tiddler]field:text[yes]] +[limit[1]]">
<$text text={{{ [match[yes]then[Cargando...]else[Loading...]] }}}/>
<$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/getting-plugins-index]is[tiddler]field:text[yes]] [[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/updaing]is[tiddler]field:text[yes]] +[limit[1]]">
<$text text={{{ [match[yes]then[Cargando...]else[Loading...]] }}}/>

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/update-manager.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/update-manager
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/update-manager.caption: <$text text={{{ [[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[Actualizacion]else[Updates]] }}} />
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/update-manager.text:
<$list filter="[[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[yes]else[no]]" variable="chinese">
<$button disabled={{{ [{$:/temp/CPL-Repo/getting-plugins-index}match[yes]else[no]] }}} class="tc-btn-big-green tc-primary-btn">
<$action-sendmessage $message="cpl-update-check" />
{{$:/core/images/refresh-button}}
 
<$text text={{{ [[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/update-plugins]is[tiddler]] :then[<chinese>match[yes]then[Recuperar actualizaciones]else[Refetch CPL]] :else[<chinese>match[yes]then[Obtener actualizaciones]else[Fetch update]] }}} />
</$button>
</$list>

{{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/update-body}}

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/update-notify-.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/update-notify-template
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/update-notify-.text:
<$list filter="[[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[yes]else[no]]" variable="chinese">

<$list filter="[<chinese>match[yes]]">

!! CPL Recordatorio de actualizacion

tu Wiki si <<updateCount>> El complemento es CPL Hay una version actualizada en, Ven y actualiza pronto!

<$button class="cpl-normal-button">
    Actualizacion
    <$action-sendmessage $message="cpl-get-plugins-index" />
    <$action-sendmessage $message="tm-modal" $param="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/update-body" />
</$button>
<$button class="cpl-normal-button">
    Configuracion
    <$action-sendmessage $message="tm-modal" $param="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/settings" />
</$button>

</$list>

<$list filter="[<chinese>!match[yes]]">

!! CPL Update Alert

There are <<updateCount>> plugins in your Wiki that have newer versions in CPL, so update them now!

<$button class="cpl-normal-button">
    Update
    <$action-sendmessage $message="cpl-get-plugins-index" />
    <$action-sendmessage $message="tm-modal" $param="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/update-body" />
</$button>
<$button class="cpl-normal-button">
    Settings
    <$action-sendmessage $message="tm-modal" $param="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/settings" />
</$button>

</$list>

</$list>
